name.title: Name
name.description: A unique name for this OAuth2/OIDC platform instance.

providers.title: Identity Providers
providers.description: Configure one or more OAuth2 / OIDC identity providers.

id.title: Provider ID
id.description: A unique identifier for this provider (used by other plugins to reference it).

displayName.title: Display Name
displayName.description: A human-readable name for this provider.

discoveryUrl.title: OIDC Discovery URL
discoveryUrl.description: The OpenID Connect discovery URL (e.g. https://accounts.google.com/.well-known/openid-configuration). Leave empty to configure endpoints manually.

authorizationEndpoint.title: Authorization Endpoint
authorizationEndpoint.description: OAuth2 authorization endpoint (not needed if discovery URL is provided).

tokenEndpoint.title: Token Endpoint
tokenEndpoint.description: OAuth2 token endpoint (not needed if discovery URL is provided).

scopes.title: Scopes
scopes.description: Default scopes to request (space-separated). Defaults to 'openid profile email'.

redirectPort.title: Callback Port
redirectPort.description: Local port for the OAuth2 redirect callback. Defaults to a random available port if not set.

pkce.title: Use PKCE
pkce.description: Use PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange) for the authorization code flow.

callbackHost.title: Callback Host
callbackHost.description: The hostname or IP address to use in redirect URIs (defaults to localhost).

tokenRefreshInterval.title: Token Refresh Interval (minutes)
tokenRefreshInterval.description: How often to proactively refresh tokens before they expire. Set to 0 to disable proactive refresh.

encryptionSecret.title: Encryption Secret
encryptionSecret.description: A secret used to encrypt tokens at rest on disk (AES-256-GCM). Leave empty to store tokens as plain JSON.

managementPort.title: Management API Port
managementPort.description: Port for the management HTTP API and UI. Leave empty for a random port.
